concept: SQLite database library: connection creation, schema declarations, execution commands, and fetch cursors. Pure API data — no rules, no references to any other library; the pattern vials bind to it through 'provides' and 'is_a database_library'.
facts:
import sqlite3
db = sqlite3.connect('game.db')
db.execute('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scores (player TEXT, points INTEGER)')
db.commit()
